spec_match.rationale: Perfect compliance. Utilizes a real @property --angle CSS custom property definition and animation keyframes to drive the rotating conic-gradient on top of the native background-clip: padding-box, border-area declaration.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Features a Play/Pause button, border width slider, speed control slider, and border radius slider, dynamically adjusting the cards.

edge_cases.rationale: Excellent fallback. If the browser does not support border-area natively, the JavaScript fallback injects the older double-background shorthand natively so the demo is perfectly readable on older engines.

references.rationale: Correct MDN background-clip and sibling links.

design_system.rationale: Clean layouts, dark play buttons, responsive sliders, and elegant card rendering.

summary: A gorgeous interactive conic-gradient spinning card using CSS Custom Properties and keyframes, complete with a robust fallback renderer for older rendering engines.
